messages.content: Toy Story 3 DVD Rated AU Released date
Toy Story 3 was released in Australia on November 24, 2010 on DVD. It was rated G by the Australian Classification Board.
Toy Story 3 DVD Rated UK Released date
Toy Story 3 was released in the United Kingdom on November 22, 2010 on DVD. It was rated U by the British Board of Film Classification.
Toy Story 3 DVD Rated USA Released date
Toy Story 3 was released in the United States on November 2, 2010 on DVD. It was rated G by the Motion Picture Association of America.
Toy Story 3 DVD Rated CA Released date
Toy Story 3 was released in Canada on November 2, 2010 on DVD. It was rated G by the Canadian Home Video Rating System.

Chicken Run Rated USA UK AU CA Released date is a production of
"Chicken Run" is a production of Aardman Animations, a British animation studio known for its stop-motion clay animation technique.

"The Nut Job" is a production of ToonBox Entertainment, a Canadian animation studio.
